title: Victim loses $20,000 to ubank impersonator — scammer posed as fraud team citing unauthorised transaction, obtained card details and OTP codes by phone to drain account.
ASIC & ACCC warn of fake crypto trading platforms using WhatsApp and social media groups to defraud investors, especially Gen Z.
AFP warns bank impersonation scammers are using hold music and tag-team calls to drain accounts - losses up to $350k in hours.
Scamwatch alerts: Criminals impersonating AFP officers with fake ReportCyber reports to steal cryptocurrency wallet seed phrases.
Mobile phone porting fraud on the rise - scammers taking control of phone numbers to bypass bank security and steal funds.
ASIC reports record 11,964 scam website takedowns in 2025 - 90% increase - AI-powered scams surging across Australia.
Qantas impersonation scams continue via text and email - fake refund offers and expiring points steal personal data.
ACCC phone numbers being spoofed by scammers claiming to be representatives requesting sensitive personal information.
ATO & AFP raid alleged tax fraud kingpin using stolen IDs and phishing to lodge fraudulent returns - proceeds in crypto.
Business Email Compromise scams target construction sector - $41,800 to $338,000 stolen through spoofed supplier invoices.
ASIC warns super scams targeting Australia's $4 trillion system - cold calls pushing suspicious fund switches.
Major Canvas education platform breach affects Australian schools and universities - ShinyHunters group claims responsibility.
National Anti-Scam Centre reports $2.18 billion lost to scams in 2025 - investment scams remain the top threat category.
